fault_hypothesis: The conversion from floating-point planned allocations to integers on line 70 uses simple truncation (`int()`), which discards the fractional parts. This causes the sum of the final integer allocations to be less than the total credits available when the total is not perfectly divisible.

constraints.intent: The sum of allocated integer credits must equal the total credits available.
The sum of pre-rounded planned allocations must equal the total credits.
The sum of integer allocations after rounding must equal the total credits.
The final returned list of allocations must sum up to the total.
